raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The claim of being the 'first' robotic control framework to route action queries is too sweeping and lacks specific contrast with prior work.",
    "R1.7": "There are no audits of every load-bearing citation, only one missing or wrong citation was flagged.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim is flagged but not all recommendations have their confidence and missing evidence marked.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces no regressions; however, there is one minor regression in the form of a non-reproducible latency claim.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The claim of being the 'first' robotic control framework to route action queries is too sweeping and lacks specific contrast with prior work.
rationale.R1.7: There are no audits of every load-bearing citation, only one missing or wrong citation was flagged.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim is flagged but not all recommendations have their confidence and missing evidence marked.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces no regressions; however, there is one minor regression in the form of a non-reproducible latency claim.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
